goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'hotel type'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should 'arrive by 08:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free parking
Make sure you get phone number and hotel type
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to london kings cross
The train should arrive by 08:30 and should depart from cambridge
